manner: Sounds hospitable until terms blur, then becomes sharply attentive to cost and precedent. hidden_pressure: Must read timing, trust, and supply pressure early enough that a market problem does not become a civic one. Around Guildheart Hub, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of thieves visibly slip.
